ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 34/XXS) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "armor_lux_equivalence" INTEGER /* Armor Lux equivalence (a standardized size metric) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size chart is applicable */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for customer support */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand that produces the item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is designed (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size available for the item */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count for this size of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory count */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering inventory reordering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* The customer's preferred size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the item purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items purchased */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase associated with the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)
